description: MCP server for self-hosted Laserfiche repositories — search and read documents from Claude.
name: io.github.SamuelSHernandez/laserfiche-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Laserfiche Repository API Server, e.g. https://lf.example.com/LFRepositoryAPI
environmentVariables.name: LF_REPO_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Repository name or ID to operate against.
environmentVariables.name: LF_REPOSITORY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Service-account username with read access to the repository.
environmentVariables.name: LF_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Repository API version: v1 (default) or v2.
environmentVariables.name: LF_API_VERSION

environmentVariables.description: Read-only mode. Defaults to true; set false to register the write tools.
environmentVariables.name: LF_READ_ONLY
